intro:
Unfortunately, I could not find information about the plant Loniceroides. However, I found information about the plant Lonicera, which is a genus of flowering plants in the family Caprifoliaceae. 

Here is a paragraph about the plant Lonicera:

The plant Lonicera, commonly known as Honeysuckle, is a flowering vine native to the Northern Hemisphere. The health benefits of Lonicera include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, promote sleep, and alleviate symptoms of menopause due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The bioactive constituents of Lonicera include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. The most common herbal preparations made with Lonicera include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which are used to treat a range of health issues, including insomnia, hypertension, and menstrual cramps.
